samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Design an 8-bit divider using a combination of sequential and combinational logic.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal for synchronous operations.</input>
        <input id="rst">Reset signal for initializing the module.</input>
        <input id="sign">1-bit flag indicating whether the operation is signed (1) or unsigned (0).</input>
        <input id="dividend" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input for the dividend.</input>
        <input id="divisor" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input for the divisor.</input>
        <input id="opn_valid">Valid operation signal to initiate the division.</input>
        <input id="res_ready">Signal indicating that the 16-bit result is ready to be consumed.</input>
        <output id="res_valid">Output signal indicating the result is valid and ready to be consumed.</output>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output for the division result, containing both the quotient and remainder.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="IDLE">0</parameter>
        <parameter id="SUB">1</parameter>
        <parameter id="ADD">2</parameter>
        <parameter id="SHIFT">3</parameter>
        <parameter id="DONE">4</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic">8-bit register for the current state of the FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="next_state" type="sequential_logic">8-bit register for the next state of the FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="count" type="sequential_logic">8-bit register for the count of iterations.</reg>
        <reg id="shift_reg" type="sequential_logic">16-bit register for the shift register.</reg>
        <reg id="result" type="sequential_logic">16-bit register for the result.</reg>
        <reg id="remainder" type="sequential_logic">16-bit register for the remainder.</reg>
        <reg id="quotient" type="sequential_logic">16-bit register for the quotient.</reg>
        <reg id="done" type="sequential_logic">1-bit register indicating the completion of the operation.</reg>
        <reg id="sign" type="sequential_logic">1-bit register indicating whether the operation is signed or unsigned.</reg>
        <reg id="signed_flag" type="sequential_logic">1-bit register indicating whether the operation is signed.</reg>
        <reg id="unsigned_flag" type="sequential_logic">1-bit register indicating whether the operation is unsigned.</reg>
        <reg id="dividend" type="sequential_logic">16-bit register for the dividend.</reg>
        <reg id="divisor" type="sequential_logic">16-bit register for the divisor.</reg>
        <reg id="neg_divisor" type="sequential_logic">16-bit register for the negative divisor.</reg>
        <reg id="temp" type="combinational_logic">16-bit register for temporary calculations.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <case>
            <case_item id="IDLE">
                <description>Idle state of the FSM.</description>
                <sequential_logic>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <term>opn_valid is high</term>
                                <term>res_valid is low</term>
                            </and>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <sequential>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>state</lhs>
                                    <rhs>next_state</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>count</lhs>
                                    <rhs>0</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>shift_reg</lhs>
                                    <rhs>dividend</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>neg_divisor</lhs>
                                    <rhs>0</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>signed_flag</lhs>
                                    <rhs>sign</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>unsigned_flag</lhs>
                                    <rhs>sign</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>divisor</lhs>
                                    <rhs>0</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>temp</lhs>
                                    <rhs>0</rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </sequential>
                        </then>
                    </if>
                </sequential_logic>
            </case_item>
            <case_item id="SUB">
                <description>Subtraction step of the division algorithm.</description>
                <sequential_logic>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <or>
                                <term>count is 8</term>
                                <term>done is high</term>
                            </or>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <sequential>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>state</lhs>
                                    <rhs>DONE</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>done</lhs>
                                    <rhs>1</rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </sequential>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <sequential>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>temp</lhs>
                                    <rhs>shift_reg - neg_divisor</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>count</lhs>
                                    <rhs>count + 1</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>shift_reg</lhs>
                                    <rhs>temp << 1</rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </sequential>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </sequential_logic>
            </case_item>
            <case_item id="ADD">
                <description>Addition step of the division algorithm.</description>
                <sequential_logic>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <or>
                                <term>count is 8</term>
                                <term>done is high</term>
                            </or>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <sequential>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>state</lhs>
                                    <rhs>DONE</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>done</lhs>
                                    <rhs>1</rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </sequential>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <sequential>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>temp</lhs>
                                    <rhs>shift_reg + divisor</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>count</lhs>
                                    <rhs>count + 1</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>shift_reg</lhs>
                                    <rhs>temp << 1</rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </sequential>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </sequential_logic>
            </case_item>
            <case_item id="SHIFT">
                <description>Shift operation of the division algorithm.</description>
                <sequential_logic>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <or>
                                <term>count is 8</term>
                                <term>done is high</term>
                            </or>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <sequential>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>state</lhs>
                                    <rhs>DONE</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>done</lhs>
                                    <rhs>1</rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </sequential>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <sequential>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>shift_reg</lhs>
                                    <rhs>shift_reg << 1</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>count</lhs>
                                    <rhs>count + 1</rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </sequential>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </sequential_logic>
            </case_item>
            <case_item id="DONE">
                <description>Completion state of the FSM.</description>
                <sequential_logic>
                    <if>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <term>res_valid is high</term>
                                <term>res_ready is high</term>
                            </and>
                        </condition>
                        <then>
                            <sequential>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>state</lhs>
                                    <rhs>0</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>count</lhs>
                                    <rhs>0</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>shift_reg</lhs>
                                    <rhs>0</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>neg_divisor</lhs>
                                    <rhs>0</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>signed_flag</lhs>
                                    <rhs>0</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>unsigned_flag</lhs>
                                    <rhs>0</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>divisor</lhs>
                                    <rhs>0</rhs>
                                </assign>
                                <assign>
                                    <lhs>temp</lhs>
                                    <rhs>0</rhs>
                                </assign>
                            </sequential>
                        </then>
                    </if>
                </sequential_logic>
            </case_item>
        </case>
    </implementation>
</module>
